title: 7 Habits of a Godly Man Who Runs His Own Life
caption:
A city with no walls gets walked into. So does a man who can't govern his own impulses.

He decides the night before, not in the moment. He names the urge out loud before he obeys it. He puts his phone in another room on purpose. He eats and sleeps like a man with somewhere to be. He keeps a promise to himself that nobody's checking.

He prays before he reacts, not after. He treats the first no as the whole answer.

"Whoever is slow to anger is better than the mighty, and he who rules his spirit than he who takes a city." — Proverbs 16:32

Self-control isn't repression. It's deciding who's actually in charge before the moment decides for you.

Save this and pick one to run this week.

#faith #discipline #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #proverbs #scripture #selfcontrol
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
